hooks.command: TOKEN=$(cat ~/.claude.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['mcpServers']['2dobetter']['env']['AUTH_TOKEN'])" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then STATUS=$(curl -sk -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 5 "https://192.168.10.165:3000/api/auth/config"); if [ "$STATUS" = "200" ]; then echo "[2Do] Live server OK (Ubuntu)"; else echo "[2Do] Warning: live server not responding (HTTP $STATUS) — deploy with: ssh ubuntu + git pull + npm run build + restart"; fi; fi
